demo.title: imageedit.sh
demo.code:
# Dry-run first — needs no key, prints the exact Replicate request
node imageedit.mjs --op edit --image in/photo.png --prompt "make it a snowy night scene" --dry-run

# Instruction edit (img2img) — bring your own Replicate key
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node imageedit.mjs \
  --op edit --image in/photo.png --prompt "make it a snowy night scene" --out out/edit.png

# Inpaint a masked region (white = area to fill)
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node imageedit.mjs \
  --op inpaint --image in/photo.png --mask in/mask.png --prompt "a red door" --out out/inpaint.png

setup: Node 18+ — uses built-in fetch, zero dependencies (no npm install)
Bring your own Replicate API token: export REPLICATE_API_TOKEN (get one at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens). Edits are billed to your Replicate account, not MythosForge.
Verify with `--dry-run` (needs no key) before any live run
